heading: Assistance to foreign countries to mitigate effects of HIV and AIDS
label: 1431f Assistance to foreign countries to mitigate effects of HIV and AIDS
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2006, and not as part of the Agricultural Act of 1949 which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of the 1949 Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.section 1421 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: individuals with Human Immunodeficiency Virus or Acquired Immune Deficiency Syndrome in the communities; and

children.label: B
children.text: households in the communities, particularly individuals caring for orphaned children; and

agricultural commodities monetized to provide other assistance (including assistance under microcredit and microenterprise programs) to create or restore sustainable livelihoods among individuals in the communities, particularly individuals caring for orphaned children.
